name: Hope for More Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, baking soda, and cocoa powder three times.
2. In a separate bowl, cream the shortening until smooth.
3. Gradually add sugar to the shortening, beating until light and fluffy.
4. Add eggs one at a time, mixing for 2 minutes after each addition.
5. Alternate adding the flour mixture with buttermilk, beating on medium speed after each addition.
6. Stir in vanilla extract.
7. Gradually mix in boiling water, beating well after each addition.
8. Pour batter into two ungreased 8-inch cake pans.
9. Bake at 350°F for 20 to 25 minutes.
10. In a double boiler over simmering water, combine sugar, salt, cream of tartar, egg whites, and water.
11. Beat until foamy, then beat an additional 4-5 minutes.
12. Remove from heat and let cool slightly before beating for another minute.
13. Add vanilla extract and blend well.
14. Frost the chocolate cake.
